nasb.text: After these things I looked, and the temple of the tabernacle of testimony in heaven was opened,

esv.text: After this I looked, and the sanctuary of the tent of witness in heaven was opened,

cnv.text: 這些事以後，我觀看，見天上安放約櫃的帳幕的聖所開了。

ccb.text: 这事之后，我看见天上存放约柜的圣殿打开了。

csbs.text: 这些事以后，我又观看，看哪，天上的圣所，就是那见证的会幕开了。
